uk: 🕁 Св. і славного великомученика Димитрія Мироточця
saints.en: St. Glorious Great Martyr Demetrius the Myrrh-Streamer

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» 8 стихир влкмч. Слава: влкмч., І нині: богородичний-догмат 5-го за гласом «Слава». Вхід. Прокімен дня і три читання влкмч.: Іс. 43:9-14, Муд. 3:1-9, Муд. 4:7-15. Стихири на литії - влкмч. Стиховня влкмч., зі своїми приспівами. На благословенні хлібів: Тропар влкмч., двічі і «Богородице Діво» раз. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби влкмч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь»: тропар влкмч. (2), Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних, за гласом тропаря влкмч. Катизми чергові з сідальними влкмч., також полієлей з величаннями і пополієлейний сідальний влкмч. Степенна 4-го гласу, перший антифон. Прокімен влкмч. Єв. – Мт. 36 зач.; 10, 16-22. Пс. 50, і стихира влкмч. Канон Богородиці і два влкмч. Катавасія: «Відкрию уста мої». По 3-ій пісні – сідальний влкмч. По 6-ій – кондак-ікос влкмч. По 9-ій – світильний влкмч. Хвалитні стихири влкмч. – 4, Слава: влкмч., І нині: богород. По великому славослов'ї – тропар влкмч., Слава, І нині: богород. з недільних за гласом тропаря влкмч. Відпуст великий з помин. тільки служби влкмч.
Часи: на всіх – тропар і кондак влкмч.
Літургія: все – тільки влкмч. Влкмч.: Ап. – Тим. 292 зач.; 2, 1-10. Єв. – Ів. 52 зач.; 15, 17 – 16, 2.

troparion_en.text: Christ our God, You look upon the earth and it trembles; / deliver us from the terrible threat of earthquakes; / and through the prayers of the Theotokos, send down upon us / Your abundant mercy and save us.

kontakion_en.text: Deliver us all from upheavals, and from terrible afflictions caused by our sins, O Lord, / and spare Your people people whom You have purchased with Your blood, O Master. / Do not deliver Your city to destruction by terrible earthquakes, / for we know no other God than You; / and to those who cry out You respond: / “I am with you and no one will be against you.”

matched_oca_saint: Commemoration of the Great Earthquake at Constantinople

oca_saints.name: Holy, Glorious Demetrios the Myrrh-gusher of Thessaloniki

troparion.text: The entire world has found you to be a great champion in times of peril;  / for you put the heathen to flight, O victorious one.  /  As you brought to naught the boasts of Lyaeus, and gave courage to Nestor in the stadium, /  in the same way, O Holy Great Martyr Demetrios,  / entreat Christ God, that He grant us great mercy.

kontakion.text: (The Original Melody)God, Who has given you invincible strength, Demetrios,  / has adorned the Church with the royal purple of the streams of your blood,  / and has kept your city unharmed,  / for you are its support.

oca_saints.name: Commemoration of the Great Earthquake at Constantinople

troparion.text: Christ our God, You look upon the earth and it trembles; / deliver us from the terrible threat of earthquakes; / and through the prayers of the Theotokos, send down upon us / Your abundant mercy and save us.

kontakion.text: Deliver us all from upheavals, and from terrible afflictions caused by our sins, O Lord, / and spare Your people people whom You have purchased with Your blood, O Master. / Do not deliver Your city to destruction by terrible earthquakes, / for we know no other God than You; / and to those who cry out You respond: / “I am with you and no one will be against you.”

oca_saints.name: Saint Theophilus of the Kiev Caves, Bishop of Novgorod

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; / your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Theophilus, / entreat Christ our God / that our souls may be saved.

Your holy martyr Lupus, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Lupus;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Athanasius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Monastic Martyr Joseph of Dionysiou, Mount Athos

troparion.text: The image of God was truly preserved in you, O Father, / for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. / By so doing you taught us to disregard the flesh for it passes away / but to care instead for the soul, since it is immortal. / Therefore your spirit, venerable Joseph, rejoices with the angels.

kontakion.text: As a venerable and proven ascetic, as an honorable and renowned martyr,  / and as a model of the desert life, O most exalted Joseph, /  we sing hymns of praise to you,  / for you have trampled upon serpents.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Demetrius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!
